headline: Stop losing, start cutting—today demands discipline
summary: You're losing at 0.25 kg/week but need 0.63 kg/week; today you stop food excuses and move hard before the weekend snacking trap.
details: First: strict portions today—use Huel for lunch, no snacking between meals, avoid vegan processed foods masking calories. Second: 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today; this compounds weekly impact fast. Third: Thursday's discipline prevents weekend collapse; you've got 619 days of lag to erase, and it starts now with today's actual choices.
